_description: Adam's design and product preferences. Updated automatically when feedback is given. Read by the AI builder before every task.

dislikes: modals for everything — prefer slide panels or inline editing
cluttered navigation with too many items
excessive white space that wastes screen space
tooltips that are too small to read

ux.navigation: sidebar for dashboards, top nav for marketing pages
ux.empty_states: always show a helpful empty state with a CTA
ux.errors: plain English, tell the user what to do next
ux.confirmations: only ask for confirmation on destructive actions

code.framework: vanilla JS + Tailwind for frontend, Express for backend
code.state: keep it simple, no React unless explicitly asked
code.apis: RESTful, JSON, consistent error format { ok: false, error: string }
code.auth: COMMAND_CENTER_KEY Bearer token on all admin routes
